steps.t: The Straight Stair marks the start of your journey into Cirith Ungol. You can find it through a pass just behind Halhir, who is stationed along the Mo…
Echad Taerdim, the Ranger camp in Cirith Ungol under command of Mablung, can be found at the top of the Straight Stair. You should travel to Echad Tae…
Legolas can be found at Echad Taerdim, the Ranger camp in Cirith Ungol. You should talk to Legolas.
Legolas believes the first course of action is to gather information from the Rangers of Ithilien stationed at Echad Taerdim. You should talk to Mablu…
Legolas is waiting for you in Echad Taerdim, the Ranger camp in Cirith Ungol. You should talk to Legolas.
